title: Monitoring spec MAXLEN drift for stream:opportunities
expected: Monitoring spec and code agree on MAXLEN values
actual: Monitoring spec says stream:opportunities MAXLEN = 50,000 but code has 100,000 since OPT-4 optimization
recommendation: Update monitoring.md System Inventory to reflect 100,000 for stream:opportunities

title: failover-coordinator consumer group not implemented
evidence: Grep for 'failover-coordinator' across all .ts files returns 0 results. Listed in monitoring System Inventory as reading from stream:system-failover
expected: failover-coordinator group exists in coordinator code for failover handling
actual: No code references 'failover-coordinator' group — group exists only in monitoring spec documentation
recommendation: Either implement failover-coordinator in coordinator service or remove from monitoring inventory

title: LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT env var undocumented
expected: All env vars used in production code documented in .env.example
actual: LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT is used in Redis Streams factory but not documented in .env.example
recommendation: Add LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT=false to .env.example with comment explaining it enables pre-OP-18 HMAC backward compat

title: SIMULATION_REALISM_LEVEL and WORKER_POOL_SIZE undocumented in .env.example
evidence: Used in unified-detector chain-simulation-handler and monitor scripts but not in .env.example
actual: SIMULATION_REALISM_LEVEL and WORKER_POOL_SIZE are used in service code but only CONSTRAINED_MEMORY is documented in .env.example
recommendation: Add SIMULATION_REALISM_LEVEL=high and WORKER_POOL_SIZE=4 to .env.example under simulation section

title: All production code uses RedisStreams constants
evidence: Grep for hardcoded 'stream:*' strings in services/*/src/ and shared/core/src/ returned 0 results in non-comment lines
expected: No hardcoded stream names in production code
actual: All stream references use RedisStreams.* constants from @arbitrage/types — correct
recommendation: No action needed — pattern is well-enforced

title: MAXLEN enforcement comprehensive — all 24 streams covered
evidence: shared/core/src/redis/streams.ts:402-430 — STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS covers all 24 RedisStreams values. xaddWithLimit() uses this map. StreamBatcher uses xaddWithLimit (SA-002 fix)
actual: xaddWithLimit() auto-applies MAXLEN from STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS. StreamBatcher.flush() uses xaddWithLimit(). All 24 streams have entries.

title: StreamConsumer auto-ACK pattern consistently applied
evidence: shared/core/src/redis/stream-consumer.ts:370-375 — autoAck defaults to true, ACK called after successful handler. All service consumers use StreamConsumer or explicit xack()
actual: StreamConsumer handles ACK automatically. DLQ cleanup also ACKs stuck messages (ES-003). Pattern is correct.

title: HMAC signing fail-closed in production — properly enforced
evidence: shared/core/src/redis/streams.ts:454-463 — throws Error if !signingKey && NODE_ENV === 'production'. verifySignature rejects unsigned messages. STREAM_SIGNING_KEY documented in .env.example:469
actual: Constructor throws without signing key in production. Verification rejects unsigned/tampered messages. Key rotation supported via STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS.

title: All 23 feature flags validated and documented
evidence: shared/config/src/feature-flags.ts has all 23 flags. .env.example documents all flags. Cross-dependency validation present for SIGNAL_CACHE_READ->ML_SIGNAL_SCORING, COMMIT_REVEAL_REDIS->REDIS_URL, SOLANA_EXECUTION->SOLANA_RPC_URL
actual: All 23 flags present with correct opt-in/opt-out patterns. FEATURE_DYNAMIC_L1_FEES correctly uses opt-out (!== 'false'). Cross-dependency validation in validateFeatureFlags()

title: Risk configuration complete with cross-validation
evidence: shared/config/src/risk-config.ts:264-338 — validateRiskConfig() checks all bounds. Line 328: defaultWinProbability >= minWinProbability cross-validation. RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL required in production (line 270).
actual: All 6 risk env vars documented in .env.example. Cross-validation prevents defaultWinProbability < minWinProbability. Production requires explicit RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL.

title: No || 0 anti-pattern in production code
evidence: Grep for '|| 0' in .ts files found 9 occurrences — all in test files (__tests__ directories)
actual: All occurrences are in test files where the pattern is acceptable
